news.headline: New Data Shows Where ICE Has Been Most Active This Year
news.summary: The pace of ICE arrests nationwide has topped 1,100 per day on average in 2026, but the rate of arrests has varied across the country in sometimes surprising ways.

news.headline: Trump Organization Eyes Transylvania Golf Course Deal
news.summary: The president’s company is eyeing a site for a golf course and luxury apartments. Will a huge landfill and a troubled project history stand in the way?

news.headline: Trump to praise Japan in China, Xi summit delayed, PLA-Nato talks
news.summary:
US President Donald Trump said he will be “speaking Japan’s praises” when he makes a delayed trip to China, even with the two Asian nations engaged in a long-running dispute over Taiwan.
The Beijing visit, including a summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping, has been postponed “for about a month an

news.headline: Hezbollah is bombing northern Israel again. Residents are staying put.
news.summary: Rather than evacuation, Israel’s defense minister said the mission now is “to protect northern communities against raids and anti-tank fire.”

news.headline: How Geopolitics Threaten K-Pop’s Ambitions in China
news.summary: Japanese members of some K-pop bands have been absent from recent concerts in China. Experts say that’s linked to tension between Tokyo and Beijing.
